cases.question: Configure NeMo Relay export for a backend that understands OpenInference spans and LLM semantics.
cases.ground_truth: Use the OpenInference export skill to configure the OpenInference subscriber/export path, preserve model and tool metadata, and validate semantic span fields.
expected_behavior: Choose OpenInference rather than generic OTEL when semantic LLM fields matter
Configure the OpenInference subscriber or exporter path
Preserve model, tool, and scope metadata
Validate emitted semantic fields in the target backend or test output

cases.question: I need a portable ATIF document for offline replay.
cases.ground_truth: Portable ATIF documents belong to nemo-relay-export-atif-trajectories.
